== Lee Gi-na ♀ ==
An innocent lady who used to live a luxurious life with her ex. Now she only lives for love!

=== Begin Friendship ===
To obtain Lee Gi-na, complete [[Cathay]] Key Clue "Sheet Music Collector"

=== ☆☆☆ > ★★☆ ===
After 6 letters back and forth, Lee Gi-na will arrive at [[Home Base]] and gift Lee Gi-na's Photo Album (Novice Scroll +10, Expert Scroll +10)

=== ★★☆ > ★★★ ===
After 16 letters back and forth, Lee Gi-na will move in permanently with her minion, Minorino.

==Rent ==
[[File:Lee Gi-na rent.png|frameless|left]]

Lee Gi-na rent is collected on '''Sunday''' and as a bunch of scrolls in the vase.

 '''Normal Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Bach Concerto|blue}}

 '''Rare Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Moonlight Sonata|purple}}, {{RewardIconWithLink|The Nutcracker|purple}}

 '''1-time Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Bloodhoph Letter|green}}

{{clear}}

==Relics ==
Upgrading these will earn Evolution Chest!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"  
!Relic Tier
!Reward
|-
|★
|Evolution Chest +20
|-
|★★
|Evolution Chest +20 
|-
|★★★
|Evolution Chest +20
|-
|★★★★
|Evolution Chest +40 
|-
|★★★★★
|Evolution Chest +60
|-
|★★★★★★ 
|Evolution Chest +80
|}

{| class="wiki-table" style="width:100%; text-align:center;" 
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Universe Bowl}}{{Relink|Universe Bowl}}
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Persian Star Chart}}{{Relink|Persian Star Chart}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Prince's Rose}}{{Relink|Prince's Rose}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Kani Jade}}{{Relink|Kani Jade}}
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Koh-i-Noor Diamond}}{{Relink|Koh-i-Noor Diamond}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Pandora's Box}}{{Relink|Pandora's Box}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Arkanrock}}{{Relink|Arkanrock}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Leaf of Yggdrasil}}{{Relink|Leaf of Yggdrasil}}
|}

== Lee Gi-na's Love Song==
This is me standing in the snow, saying I am sorry for that night! And I'll go back to January all the time...

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Research Skill<br>Required
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||0||CIV +5||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +1%
|-
|2||180||2k||CIV +10||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +2%
|-
|3||190||4.5k||CIV +15||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +3%
|-
|4||200||8k||CIV +20||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +4%
|-
|5||210||12.5k||CIV +25||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +5%
|-
|6||220||18k||CIV +30||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +6%
|-
|7||230||24.5k||CIV +35||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +7%
|-
|8||240||32k||CIV +40||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +8%
|-
|9||250||40.5k||CIV +45||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +9%
|-
|10||260||50k||CIV +50||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +10%
|-
|11||270||60.5k||CIV +55||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +11%
|-
|12||285||72k||CIV +60||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +12%
|-
|13||300||84.5k||CIV +65||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +13%
|-
|14||315||98k||CIV +70||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +14%
|-
|15||330||112k||CIV +75||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +15%
|-
|16||345||123k||CIV +80||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +16%
|-
|17||360||144k||CIV +85||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +17%
|-
|18||375||162k||CIV +90||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +18%
|-
|19||390||180k||CIV +95||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +19%
|-
|20||400||200k||CIV +100||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +20%
|-
|21||420||220k||CIV +105||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +21%
|-
|22||440||242k||CIV +110||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +22%
|-
|23||460||264k||CIV +115||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +23%
|-
|24||480||285k||CIV +120||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +24%
|-
|25||500||309k||CIV +125||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +25%
|-
|26||520||333k||CIV +130||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +26%
|-
|27||540||357k||CIV +135||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +27% 
|-
|28||560||381k||CIV +140||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +28%
|-
|29||580||405k||CIV +145||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +29%
|-
|30||600||429k||CIV +150||Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +30% 
|}

==Commander ==
A good commander can make the troops more effective!

Commander can only be leveled up as far as Lee gi-na's Love Song is. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +10 
|-
|2||4k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +20
|-
|3||6k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +30
|-
|4||8k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +40
|-
|5||10k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +50
|-
|6||12k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +60
|-
|7||14k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +70 
|-
|8||16k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +80
|-
|9||18k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +90
|-
|10||20k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +100
|-
|11||22k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +110
|-
|12||24k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +120
|-
|13||26k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +130
|-
|14||28k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +140
|-
|15||30k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +150
|-
|16||32k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +160
|-
|17||34k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +170
|-
|18||36k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +180
|-
|19||38k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +190
|-
|20||40k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +200
|-
|21||42k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +210
|-
|22||44k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +220
|-
|23||46k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +230
|-
|24||48k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +240
|-
|25||50k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +250
|-
|26||55k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +260
|-
|27||60k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +270
|-
|28||65k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +280
|-
|29||70k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +290
|-
|30||75k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Troop HP +300
|}

==Research Ability ==
Below is a table of the research manual cost to upgrade each research gene. Lee Gi-na specializes in '''Mutant Gene''' and therefore the research manual cost for the Mutant is halved. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Manuals Required 
|-
|1-10||1
|-
|11-20||2
|-
|21-30||3
|-
|31-40||4
|-
|61-70||20
|-
|71-80||40
|-
|81-90||60
|-
|91-95||80
|-
|97||200
|-
|98||400
|-
|99||600
|-
|100||800
|}

==Minion - Minorino==
Legend has it all the minorinos come from a god who befell Thunder Cliff with a huge Palm-Leaf Fan on his shoulder. It was the first Minorino ever...

===Special Ability - Rebirth===
Per 10 Minorinos in battle, Self Recovery +2% (multiplied by minion level)

===Minion Relics===
Upgrading these relics will buff your Minorinos!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!Name
!★☆☆☆☆☆
!★★☆☆☆☆
!★★★☆☆☆
!★★★★☆☆
!★★★★★☆
!★★★★★★
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Universe Bowl}}<br>{{relink|Universe Bowl}}
|HP +1%
|DEF +1%
|ATK +1% 
|RUSH +1% 
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Persian Star Chart}}<br>{{relink|Persian Star Chart}}
|HP +1%
|DEF +1% 
|ATK +1%
|RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Prince's Rose}}<br>{{relink|Prince's Rose}}
|HP +2%
|DEF +2%
|ATK +2%
|RUSH +2%
|All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Kani Jade}}<br>{{relink|Kani Jade}}
|HP +2%
|DEF +2%
|ATK +2%
|RUSH +2%
|All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Koh-i-Noor Diamond}}<br>{{relink|Koh-i-Noor Diamond}}
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Pandora's Box}}<br>{{relink|Pandora's Box}}
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Arkanrock}}<br>{{relink|Arkanrock}}
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Leaf of Yggdrasil}}<br>{{relink|Leaf of Yggdrasil}}
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|}

[[Category:Partners]]
[[Category:Time Machine Output Boost]]
[[Category:Minion HP Boost]]
